code: export const isEmailValid=email=>/\S+@\S+\.\S+/.test(email);export const hasValue=value=>value.trim().length>0;export const isLoginValid=_ref=>{let{email,password}=_ref;return hasValue(email)&&hasValue(password)&&isEmailValid(email);};export const isRegisterValid=_ref2=>{let{name,email,password}=_ref2;return hasValue(name)&&hasValue(email)&&hasValue(password)&&isEmailValid(email);};export const isTaskValid=_ref3=>{let{title}=_ref3;return hasValue(title);};
